subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The One, the Single, hath turned towards thee and maketh mention of that from which the fragrance of the Desired One wafteth in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد توجه الیک الفرد الاحد و یذکرک بما یتضوع منه عرف المقصود فی هذا الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
